scripts.validate:example: npm run build && node dist/packages/cli/src/main.js validate packages/schema/examples/avatar-lite.character.json
scripts.build:example: npm run build && node dist/packages/cli/src/main.js build packages/schema/examples/avatar-lite.character.json --out /tmp/kugutu-avatar-lite.charbundle.json
scripts.build:web-basic: npm run sync:web-basic-demo && vite build --config apps/web-basic/vite.config.ts
